strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from APIs to UIs and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) suggest seniority beyond junior/mid-level scope
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to the role’s tech stack
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with a track record of building scalable systems, but his senior-level title, limited PostgreSQL/AWS exposure, and weak German language skills raise questions about fit for an entry-level, on-site role in Berlin.
